'''Derenath''' was a barren, [[Water/Legends|icy]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the sixth [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Beheboth]] in the [[Beheboth system/Legends|Beheboth system]],<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" /> a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Sanbra sector/Legends|Sanbra sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EA Outer Rim" /> Derenath had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Derenath was mentioned in "Return to Prosperity," the first article in the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series ''[[Beheboth: Blood and Water]]''. The article was published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[June 3]], [[2004]], and it was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]].<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Beheboth system, and therefore Derenath, in grid square O-17.<ref name="TEA" />
